title: Tasbih â€” Digital Prayer Counter
description: A digital tasbih (prayer bead) counter Android app that allows users to keep count of their prayers and dhikr. Features multiple counter profiles, session history tracking, and a clean Material Design interface optimized for one-handed use.

images.title: Digital Counter
images.desc: Interactive digital tasbih counter with tap and swipe gestures.

images.title: Prayer Sessions
images.desc: Track and review your daily prayer and remembrance sessions.

images.title: App Settings
images.desc: Customize counter sounds, themes, and notification preferences.
